validation.note: 3 production files (types, domain, view). Ratio 2.67 slightly exceeds 2.5 but decomposition follows 1:1 acceptance-test-file mapping with no identical-pattern batching possible — each step covers a distinct pure-function concern.

steps.title: Table row data with status, name, cost, and tokens
steps.description: Create types module and buildTableRows transforming sessions + metrics into TableRow[]. Include formatCostColumn and formatTokenColumn formatters.
acceptance_criteria: Each row has status derived from isSessionActive and name from cwd
Cost formatted as dollar string (e.g. '$1.24')
Token count formatted with K suffix (e.g. '142.5K')
Sessions with no metrics produce rows with zero/default values

steps.title: Row selection and keyboard navigation
steps.description: Implement selectFocusedRow returning session ID and moveFocus with boundary clamping.
acceptance_criteria: Selecting a row returns its session ID
Arrow down/up increments/decrements focus index by one
Focus clamps at 0 and rowCount-1 boundaries
Zero rows produces index -1
selectFocusedRow extracts session ID from focused row

steps.title: Column sorting with toggle and persistence
steps.description: Implement sortTableRows for column-based sorting and applySortToggle for asc/desc cycling. Default sort: active-first then recency.
acceptance_criteria: Default sort places active sessions above completed, each by recency
Clicking column header toggles between ascending and descending
Numeric columns sort numerically, not lexicographically
Sessions with missing metrics sort as zero
Re-sorting after data update preserves current sort state

steps.title: Heat coloring for metric cells
steps.description: Implement computeHeatLevel mapping value+columnId to neutral/amber/red and deriveHeatClass producing CSS class string.
acceptance_criteria: Cost, context, burn rate, tokens, and API health columns each have thresholds
Heat intensity is monotonic: higher value never produces lower heat
Zero and missing values produce neutral heat level
deriveHeatClass maps HeatLevel to a CSS class string

steps.title: Active/Recent row grouping
steps.description: Implement groupSessionRows splitting rows into active and recent groups based on session activity status. Include toggleGroupCollapsed for collapse/expand state.
acceptance_criteria: Active sessions (not ended, event within 5 min) grouped separately from recent
Each group includes a count of contained rows
Stale session (no event >5 min) appears in recent group
Empty groups return zero count with empty array
Toggling a group's collapsed state returns the opposite boolean value

steps.title: Status bar aggregates
steps.description: Implement computeStatusBarData summing session count, total cost, and total tokens across visible rows. Uses formatCostColumn and formatTokenColumn from step 01-01 for display formatting.
acceptance_criteria: Session count equals length of visible rows
Total cost equals sum of individual row costs
Total tokens equals sum of individual row token counts
Empty row array produces all-zero aggregates

steps.title: Optional column toggle and formatters
steps.description: Implement toggleColumn add/remove, getAvailableOptionalColumns listing 7 optional columns, and formatCacheHitPct for cache percentage display.
acceptance_criteria: 7 optional columns available: version, platform, inputTokens, outputTokens, cacheHitPct, activeAgents, events
Toggle adds column if absent, removes if present
Cache hit formats as percentage string; zero total tokens yields '0%'
Missing metadata values produce null (view renders as dash)
activeAgents and events fields from SessionMetrics are available on TableRow for optional column rendering

steps.title: Wire domain functions into SessionListView
steps.description: Replace plain session list with sortable metrics table layout. Connect all domain functions (buildTableRows, sorting, grouping, heat, status bar, optional columns, keyboard nav) to the React view.
acceptance_criteria: SessionListView renders a table with status, name, cost, tokens columns
Column headers are clickable for sorting
Rows grouped under Active/Recent expandable headers
Status bar displays aggregate totals at bottom
Arrow keys navigate rows, Enter selects
